title: Decorative Storage
description: Adds a lot of barrels, trays and baskets where you can storage your resources!
body:
# 📋 Complete Minecraft challenges with Checkraft!
✅ Track your progress and share it — [Checkraft here](https://checkraft.com/)

# 📖 About
This mod includes lots types of barrels (plants, blocks etc.), baskets and trays. You can use it for storage and decorate your base!

# New official addon **Decorative Bags** is out!
![Decorative Bags addon banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/DLpaTTzJ/images/c579aca7b8afbf7ccebf8939d787ecc703e8aa8a.png)
